mapper.select: SELECT p.id AS post_id, p.title, p.content, p.user_id, p.section_id, p.create_time, p.update_time, p.is_locked, p.pin_level, p.view_count, u.username, s.name AS section_name, u.role AS user_role, COALESCE(reply_counts.reply_count, 0) AS reply_count FROM post p JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id JOIN forum_section s ON p.section_id = s.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT post_id, COUNT(*) AS reply_count FROM reply GROUP BY post_id ) reply_counts ON p.id = reply_counts.post_id ORDER BY p.pin_level DESC, reply_counts.reply_count DESC, p.create_time DESC

SELECT p.id AS post_id, p.title, p.content, p.user_id, p.section_id, p.create_time, p.update_time, p.is_locked, p.pin_level, p.view_count, u.username, s.name AS section_name, u.role AS user_role, COALESCE(reply_counts.reply_count, 0) AS reply_count FROM post p JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id JOIN forum_section s ON p.section_id = s.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT post_id, COUNT(*) AS reply_count FROM reply GROUP BY post_id ) reply_counts ON p.id = reply_counts.post_id WHERE p.id = #{id}

SELECT p.id AS post_id, p.title, p.content, p.user_id, p.section_id, p.create_time, p.update_time, p.is_locked, p.pin_level, p.view_count, u.username, s.name AS section_name, u.role AS user_role, COALESCE(reply_counts.reply_count, 0) AS reply_count FROM post p JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id JOIN forum_section s ON p.section_id = s.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT post_id, COUNT(*) AS reply_count FROM reply GROUP BY post_id ) reply_counts ON p.id = reply_counts.post_id WHERE p.section_id = #{sectionId} ORDER BY p.pin_level DESC, reply_counts.reply_count DESC, p.create_time DESC

SELECT p.id AS post_id, p.title, p.content, p.user_id, p.section_id, p.create_time, p.update_time, p.pin_level, p.view_count, u.username, s.name AS section_name, u.role AS user_role, COALESCE(reply_counts.reply_count, 0) AS reply_count FROM post p JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id JOIN forum_section s ON p.section_id = s.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT post_id, COUNT(*) AS reply_count FROM reply GROUP BY post_id ) reply_counts ON p.id = reply_counts.post_id ORDER BY p.pin_level DESC, reply_counts.reply_count DESC, p.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT p.id AS post_id, p.title, p.content, p.user_id, p.section_id, p.create_time, p.update_time, p.is_locked, p.pin_level, p.view_count, u.username, s.name AS section_name, u.role AS user_role, COALESCE(reply_counts.reply_count, 0) AS reply_count FROM post p JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id JOIN forum_section s ON p.section_id = s.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT post_id, COUNT(*) AS reply_count FROM reply GROUP BY post_id ) reply_counts ON p.id = reply_counts.post_id WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY p.pin_level DESC, reply_counts.reply_count DESC, p.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post (title, content, user_id, section_id, create_time, update_time, is_locked, view_count, pin_level) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{userId}, #{sectionId}, NOW(), NOW(), #{isLocked}, #{viewCount}, #{pinLevel})
mapper.update:
UPDATE post
title = #{title},
content = #{content},
is_locked = #{isLocked},
pin_level = #{pinLevel},
update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE post SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE post SET is_locked = true WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE post SET is_locked = false WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE post SET pin_level = #{level, jdbcType=INTEGER} WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=INTEGER}
UPDATE post SET pin_level = 0 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT p.id AS post_id, p.title, p.content, p.user_id, p.section_id, p.create_time, p.update_time, p.is_locked, p.pin_level, p.view_count, u.username, s.name AS section_name, COALESCE(reply_counts.reply_count, 0) AS reply_count FROM post p JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT post_id, COUNT(*) AS reply_count FROM reply GROUP BY post_id ) reply_counts ON p.id = reply_counts.post_id JOIN forum_section s ON p.section_id = s.id WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY reply_counts.reply_count DESC, p.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post WHERE user_id = #{userId}
